gauge.name: Huron River at Ann Arbor

impacts.statement: Water reaches the main MichCon building.
Water reaches the back building and parking lot of MichCon.
Canal Street floods by the river gauge. Water reaches apartments on Island Drive.
The record flood of March 14, 1918 is reached.
Water may begin to backup drain on Wall Street at Canal Street and also in parking lot of apartments at that intersection. Parts of Canal Street flood. Water begins to flood Island Drive.
The Riverside Park dirt parking lot floods. Water may begin to backup street drains on Island Drive by Island Park.
Flooding begins at Island Park, Riverside Park and Fuller Recreation Area.

dataAttribution.text: USGS--Water Resources of the United States
dataAttribution.title: US Geological Survey
Observations courtesy of U.S. Geological Survey

hydronotes.statement: River forecasts for this location take into account past precipitation and the precipitation amounts expected approximately 24 hours into the future from the forecast issuance time.

gauge.forecastReliability: Forecasts are issued as needed during times of high water, but are not routinely available.
